name: tencent-docs
description: Complete Tencent Docs operations — create, query, manage online documents.
review: Tencent Docs is a valid integration skill with clear functionality, but its utility is geographically constrained to users with Tencent ecosystem access (primarily mainland China). Security flagged for region-locked credential pattern. Published with advisory notes.
notes: Best suited for users in China or with Tencent ecosystem access. Requires TENCENT_DOCS_TOKEN. Geographic constraints may limit usefulness outside mainland China.
